title: Nursery Rhyme. DXV. Natural History.
content:
All of a row,
        Bend the bow,
        Shot at a pigeon,
        And killed a crow.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXV. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
